name: Cyber West: Hidden Object Games - Western
short_description: A unique cyberpunk western! Conduct an investigation like a real detective in the world of Cyber Wild West! The newest hidden object game with a storyline. Сarve out your own legend!
detailed_description:
Become a detective in the Cyber Wild West

You’ve just arrived in Red Hook, a high-tech frontier town hiding a dark secret. The town treasury has been stolen, the sheriff has disappeared, and suspicion is everywhere.

Your task? Launch a full-scale investigation. Search for hidden objects, uncover clues, question locals, and follow the trail wherever it leads. With every twist, the mystery grows more complex, and nothing is quite as it seems.

Explore a world where futuristic tech collides with old-west charm. Meet eccentric townsfolk, outsmart rival investigators, confront a notorious gang, and cross paths with a mysterious femme fatale. Your legend in the Cyber Wild West is just beginning.

Key Features

  • A unique blend of cyberpunk aesthetics and western adventure

  • Replayable levels with multiple item sets and evolving clues

  • 360° panoramic scenes alongside classic hidden object gameplay

  • Collectible rewards for mastering locations in various play modes

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Hungarian, Danish, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Ukrainian, Czech, Japanese
